landing.subtitle: Musée-Crosdale 是一座由 Facinations 精艺术协议驱动的合成文化博物馆。选择你的角色。
landing.role_vc_desc: 了解 Facinations 背后的协议、市场和愿景。

landing.role_artists_desc: 在 Facinations 中铸造、保存和传播你的藏品。
landing.role_partners_desc: 在 Blogazine 了解 Facinations 的故事和策略。

about.title: 关于 Facinations
about.lead: Facinations 是一个以精艺术为核心的平台，将博物馆级作品分解为可编程金库。
about.why_body: The global fine art market is large, illiquid, and structurally opaque. Facinations introduces a protocol layer that unlocks secondary liquidity while preserving the discretion and prestige of traditional art markets.
about.how_gallery: Gallery — discovery of curated works and civilization narratives.
about.how_exchange: Collection & Exchange — private, fine art–native secondary market.
about.how_vaults: Vaults — institutional-grade custody and provenance memory layer.
about.team_body: Facinations is built by a team at the intersection of fine art, blockchain protocol design, and narrative systems, with experience across galleries, DeFi, and cultural production.
about.body: Facinations 是一个 DeFi 原生的高端艺术金库，通过安全的链上金库实现对稀有艺术品的份额化所有权。

gallery.title: 画廊
gallery.subtitle: 精心策划的数字作品和藏品。
gallery.ai_error: Could not reach AI. Check DevTools Network tab for /api/claude errors.
gallery.ask_hint: Ask anything about technique, history, symbolism…

vaultDetail.positions_empty: 连接实时数据后，头寸将显示在此处。

swap.body: 兑换界面实现了与经过验证的出处相关联的数字资产的受控交换。
swap.risk_banner: 代币兑换涉及智能合约风险、流动性风险和价格波动。
swap.fee_notice: 高级功能 — 需要 XER 费用

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.connect_body: Your dashboard shows vault positions, XER balance, fee history, and account status. Connect a wallet to view your account.
dashboard.positions_empty: No vault positions found for this address.
dashboard.trades_empty: No trades found for this address.
dashboard.kyc_required_note: Required for swaps in US, EU, UK, CA regions.

kyc.title: Identity Verification
kyc.details_body: Enter your details exactly as they appear on your identity document.
kyc.doc_body: Choose the type of government-issued ID you'll be submitting.
kyc.upload_body: Upload a clear photo or scan of your {{documentType}}. Files are encrypted in transit and never stored beyond verification.
kyc.upload_hint: JPG, PNG, or PDF · Max 10 MB
kyc.upload_security: 256-bit encryption · GDPR compliant · Data deleted after verification
kyc.confirm_body: Your documents are being reviewed. This typically takes under 5 minutes. You'll receive confirmation and can then access all platform features.
kyc.footer_note: KYC verification is required under applicable financial regulations. See our Privacy Policy for details on data handling.
kyc.verified_body: Your KYC verification is complete. You can now access all platform features.

kycGate.pending_body: Your identity verification is being reviewed. This usually takes under 5 minutes. You'll be able to access {{feature}} once approved.
kycGate.failed_body: We were unable to verify your identity. Please check your documents and try again. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
kycGate.idle_body: Your region requires KYC verification before accessing {{feature}}. The process takes under 2 minutes and uses secure document verification.

subscriptionGate.heading: {{plan}} Plan Required
subscriptionGate.body_upgrade: {{feature}} is available on the {{plan}} plan and above. Upgrade your current plan to unlock this.
subscriptionGate.body_subscribe: {{feature}} is available on the {{plan}} plan and above. Choose a plan below to get started.

swapp.title: Swapp
swapp.subtitle: Peer-to-peer fine art & token exchange
swapp.type_vault_desc: Fractional vault shares and curated bundles
swapp.type_xer_desc: Protocol utility tokens and fee bundles
swapp.propose_hint: Add at least one asset to each side to propose a barter.
swapp.risk_notice: All barter values are informational estimates only and do not constitute financial advice. Cross-asset exchanges carry significant risk including illiquidity, valuation uncertainty, and regulatory restrictions.

xdale.title: Xdale Gallery
xdale.dealer_blurb: Xdale represents a curated roster of contemporary and emerging artists whose work engages with the intersection of materiality, concept, and the archive. The gallery operates at the frontier of traditional dealing and on-chain provenance.
xdale.enquiry_followup: The gallery will be in touch within 2 business days.
xdale.ob_body: Facinations provides galleries with on-chain provenance infrastructure, fractionalised vault listings, and direct collector access. Apply below and our team will be in touch within 3 business days.
xdale.ob_received_body: We'll review {{galleryName}}'s application and contact {{email}} within 3 business days.
xdale.ob_placeholder_about: Tell us about your programme, artists, and what you're hoping to achieve on-chain…
xdale.ob_include_2: On-chain provenance certificates for every listed work
xdale.ob_include_3: Vault fractionalization eligibility for high-value works
xdale.ob_include_5: Analytics dashboard — views, enquiries, vault interest

legal.subtitle: Facinations Protocol · Musée-Crosdale
legal.risk_banner: Digital assets and art investments involve substantial risk of loss. This platform is not available to users in certain restricted jurisdictions.
legal.body: Facinations 提供数字展示和出处追踪工具。所有权和法律义务由各自持有人负责。
legal.body2: 所有内容按原样提供，并受适用法律约束。

studio.waitlist_note: We'll be in touch when Studio opens for your region.
studio.label_goals: What do you hope to achieve?
studio.placeholder_goals: Expand collector reach, better pricing, on-chain provenance…
studio.starter_desc: 适合个人艺术家和小型经销商。
studio.gallery_desc: 适合管理库存和一级/二级流的活跃画廊。
studio.institutional_desc: 适合需要定制金库和交换流程的博物馆、基金和合作伙伴。
studio.mint_desc: 连接钱包，将您的作品直接铸造到区块链上。
studio.disclaimer: 定价和可用性须经尽职调查和司法审查。Facinations Studio 不构成投资建议。

whitepaper.title: Façinations
whitepaper.subtitle2: 纯艺术 · 区块链 · 分数主权
whitepaper.intro: 用于链上溯源、分数金库所有权和文化资产治理的去中心化协议。
whitepaper.s1_p1: Façinations 在以太坊上结合 ERC-721 和 ERC-1155 分数金库机制。
whitepaper.s1_p2: 本白皮书描述技术架构、代币经济、治理和路线图。
whitepaper.s1_disclaimer: 本文件不构成财务或投资建议。
whitepaper.s2_1_p: 全球艺术市场每年超过650亿美元，信息不对称显著。
whitepaper.s2_2_p: 高价艺术品非流动性。无分数参与标准机制。
whitepaper.s2_3_p: 现有方案忽略作品的物理世界维度。
whitepaper.s3_1_p1: 每件作品通过 FacinationsNFT 铸造为 ERC-721 代币，附 IPFS 元数据。
whitepaper.s3_1_p2: 基于角色的访问控制将铸造限于 MINTER_ROLE。
whitepaper.s3_2_p1: 所有者将 NFT 存入 FractionalVault，获得 ERC-1155 份额代币。
whitepaper.s3_2_p2: VaultRegistry 维护所有活跃金库的链上索引。
whitepaper.s3_3_p: FAC 份额可在 Swapp 上交易，由 Chainlink 预言机支持。
whitepaper.s3_4_p: CivMap 通过 geoHash 将地理空间溯源编码至链上。
whitepaper.s4_1_p: XER 是协议实用代币，发布后无通胀。
whitepaper.s4_2_p: 固定供应的每金库 ERC-1155 单位。持有者参与治理投票。
whitepaper.s4_3_p: 初始铸造 0.5%，金库创建 1.0%，Swapp 交易 0.3%。
whitepaper.s5_1_p: XER 比例投票权。3天投票，10%法定人数，48小时时间锁。
whitepaper.s5_2_p: 每金库独立模块。需要流通 FAC 简单多数。
whitepaper.s6_1_title: 第1阶段 — 测试网（当前）
whitepaper.s6_1_p: Sepolia 上 ERC-721 铸造激活。9种语言 UI 已部署。
whitepaper.s6_2_p: 以太坊主网部署。Swapp AMM Chainlink 集成。
whitepaper.s6_3_p: 地理空间编码。CivMap 预言机和热图。DAO XER 投票。
whitepaper.s6_4_p: FAC 桥接至 Polygon 和 Base。受监管托管方合作。
whitepaper.s7_1_p1: FacinationsNFT 继承经审计的 OpenZeppelin。铸造限于 MINTER_ROLE。
whitepaper.s7_1_p2: 主网前独立安全审计。多签 3-of-5。
whitepaper.s7_1_warning: 测试网合约仅用于演示。
whitepaper.s7_2_p1: Façinations 为文化资产创建主权基础设施。
whitepaper.s7_2_p2: 开放协议，面向长期机构采用。
